text: I installed FreeBSD-14.0-ALPHA2-arm64-aarch64-RPI-20230818-77013f29d048-264841.img.xz today. However, the rainbow screen issue still occurs. In theory, the uboot has been updated. Yet, the problem persists. My Raspberry Pi firmware is up to date. The problem was resolved after replacing the mentioned old uboot.
